data.name: AB0001Description
data.value: Type names should not contain the company name.
data.comment: An optional longer localizable description of the diagnostic.

data.name: AB0001MessageFormat
data.value: Type name '{0}' contains the company name
data.comment: The format-able message the diagnostic displays.

data.name: AB0001Title
data.value: Type name contains the company name

data.name: AB0001CodeFixTitle
data.value: Replace '{0}' with '{1}'
data.comment: The title of the code fix.

data.name: AB0002Description
data.value: The speed must be lower than the Speed of Light.
data.comment: An optional longer localizable description of the diagnostic.

data.name: AB0002MessageFormat
data.value: The specified speed '{0}' must be lower than the Speed of Light
data.comment: The format-able message the diagnostic displays.

data.name: AB0002Title
data.value: The impossible speed

data.name: OC0001Title
data.value: Only one level of indentation per method

data.name: OC0001Description
data.value: Methods should only have one level of indentation to improve readability.

data.name: OC0001MessageFormat
data.value: Method '{0}' contains more than one level of indentation

data.name: OC0002Title
data.value: Do not use the 'else' keyword

data.name: OC0002Description
data.value: Avoid using the 'else' keyword to promote single entry, single exit functions.

data.name: OC0002MessageFormat
data.value: 'else' keyword detected in method '{0}'

data.name: OC0003Title
data.value: Wrap primitives and strings

data.name: OC0003Description
data.value: Wrap all primitives and strings in classes to give them additional behavior and meaning.

data.name: OC0003MessageFormat
data.value: Primitive type or string detected without a wrapper in '{0}'

data.name: OC0004Title
data.value: Use only one dot per line

data.name: OC0004Description
data.value: Use only one dot per line to avoid the Law of Demeter violation, encourages encapsulation.

data.name: OC0004MessageFormat
data.value: More than one dot detected in '{0}'

data.name: OC0005Title
data.value: Do not abbreviate

data.name: OC0005Description
data.value: Do not abbreviate when naming variables, it should be clear and unambiguous.

data.name: OC0005MessageFormat
data.value: Abbreviation detected in '{0}'

data.name: OC0006Title
data.value: Keep all entities small

data.name: OC0006Description
data.value: Keep your entities small, classes should be less than 50 lines and packages should have less than 10 files.

data.name: OC0006MessageFormat
data.value: Entity '{0}' is too large, it should be less than 50 lines

data.name: OC0007Title
data.value: No classes with more than two instance variables

data.name: OC0007Description
data.value: Limit the number of instance variables in a class to encourage more cohesive, less coupled classes.

data.name: OC0007MessageFormat
data.value: Class '{0}' has more than two instance variables

data.name: OC0008Title
data.value: Use first-class collections

data.name: OC0008Description
data.value: Use first-class collections, any class that contains a collection should contain no other member variables.

data.name: OC0008MessageFormat
data.value: Class '{0}' must contain no other member variables

data.name: OC0009Title
data.value: Avoid getters and setters

data.name: OC0009Description
data.value: Do not use getters/setters/properties to encourage better encapsulation.

data.name: OC0009MessageFormat
data.value: Getter or setter detected in '{0}'
